user.title: nowaControl Hydraulic Sensor
user.description: Set up the nowaControl helper integration for ZHA quirk deployment, status and UI-first setup.

abort.single_instance_allowed: The nowaControl Hydraulic Sensor integration is already configured.

init.title: nowaControl Hydraulic Sensor
init.description: Adjust the quirk path and UI behavior.

zha_custom_quirks_path.title: ZHA custom_quirks_path missing or mismatched
zha_custom_quirks_path.description:
The nowaControl integration expects a matching ZHA quirk path in your `configuration.yaml`.

Please verify this entry and restart Home Assistant afterwards:

```yaml
zha:
  custom_quirks_path: {path}
```

quirk_not_installed.title: nowaControl ZHA quirk is not installed yet
quirk_not_installed.description: The nowaControl ZHA quirk is still missing from the active Home Assistant quirk path. Start the repair to install the bundled quirk file automatically.

confirm.title: Install ZHA quirk
confirm.description: The nowaControl integration will now copy the bundled quirk file into your configured ZHA quirk path.

restart_required.title: Home Assistant restart required for the ZHA quirk
restart_required.description: The nowaControl ZHA quirk is installed. Restart Home Assistant now and pair the sensor in ZHA again so the new entities and settings are interviewed cleanly.
